title: Reading and Use of English - Part 7
description: You are going to read an article about four people who discuss their reading habits. For questions 43–52, choose from the people (A–D). The people may be chosen more than once.

content.title: Book Lovers: Four People on Reading

texts.A:
### Laura, 27, Librarian
[43]I've loved reading since I was a child, and now I help others discover books at the library.[/43] [47]I enjoy recommending stories to people who aren't sure what to read next.[/47] [51]I prefer fiction, especially novels that take me to different worlds.[/51]
texts.B:
### Adam, 35, Engineer
[44]I didn't read much growing up, but a friend gave me a science book that changed my mind.[/44] [48]Now I read mostly non-fiction, especially about technology and history.[/48] [52]I like learning new things, so I always have a book on my desk at work.[/52]
texts.C:
### Priya, 22, Student
[45]I read every night before bed – it helps me relax and sleep better.[/45] [49]Sometimes I join online book clubs to discuss what I'm reading with others.[/49] I use an e-reader because it's easier to carry than heavy books.
texts.D:
### George, 60, Retired
[46]Since retiring, I've had more time to read, so I visit the library every week.[/46] [50]I enjoy biographies and books about real people's lives.[/50] I sometimes read to my grandchildren, which is a wonderful way to spend time together.

questions.question: has been passionate about reading since childhood?
questions.explanation: Laura has loved reading since she was a child.

questions.question: became interested in reading after receiving a book as a gift?
questions.explanation: Adam started reading after a friend gave him a science book.

questions.question: reads before going to sleep to help them relax?
questions.explanation: Priya reads every night before bed to relax and sleep better.

questions.question: visits the library regularly since retiring?
questions.explanation: George visits the library every week since retiring.

questions.question: enjoys helping others choose books?
questions.explanation: Laura enjoys recommending stories to people at the library.

questions.question: mainly reads non-fiction books?
questions.explanation: Adam reads mostly non-fiction, especially about technology and history.

questions.question: participates in online discussions about books?
questions.explanation: Priya joins online book clubs to discuss what she's reading.

questions.question: likes reading about real people's lives?
questions.explanation: George enjoys biographies and books about real people.

questions.question: prefers fiction that allows them to escape to different worlds?
questions.explanation: Laura prefers fiction, especially novels that take her to different worlds.

questions.question: always keeps a book at work to read in spare moments?
questions.explanation: Adam always has a book on his desk at work to learn new things.
